title: glycyrrhiza lepidota var. glutinosa
intro: Glycyrrhiza lepidota var. glutinosa, a lesser-known variety of licorice root, is a perennial plant species belonging to the legume family Fabaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and expectorant qualities, which have been used to treat respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. The health benefits of Glycyrrhiza lepidota var. glutinosa include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is commonly dried and used as a root or in the form of capsules, teas, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
